parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const lang = data.lang || 'tr';

const translations = {
  tr: {
    welcome: 'Merhaba! GrowApp\'a hosgeldiniz! \u{1F680}\n\nIsletmenizi buyutmek icin size her gun kisisellestirilmis gorevler onerecegiz.\n\nBaslamak icin e-posta adresinizi girin:',
    invalidEmail: '\u274C Gecersiz e-posta. Lutfen gecerli bir e-posta girin:',
    emailReceived: '\u2705 E-posta alindi!\n\nSimdi bir sifre belirleyin (en az 6 karakter):',
    passwordTooShort: '\u274C Sifre en az 6 karakter olmali. Tekrar deneyin:',
    verificationSent: (email) => `\u{1F4E7} E-postaniza 6 haneli dogrulama kodu gonderdik (${email}).\n\nKodu girin:`,
    enterCode: '6 haneli kodu girin:',
    wrongCode: '\u274C Kod yanlis! Tekrar deneyin:',
    codeExpired: '\u23F0 Kodun suresi dolmus. "yenile" yazarak yeni kod isteyin:',
    emailVerified: '\u2705 E-posta dogrulandi!\n\nSimdi isletmenizin adini girin:',
    businessNameTooShort: 'Isletme adi en az 2 karakter olmali:',
    businessNameConfirm: (name) => `Harika, "${name}"! \u{1F3EA}\n\nIsletme turunuzu secin:`,
    cafe: '\u2615 Kafe',
    restaurant: '\u{1F37D}\uFE0F Restoran',
    selectCafeOrRestaurant: '"Kafe" veya "Restoran" secin:',
    surveyIntro: '\u{1F4CA} Mukemmel! Simdi isletmenizi daha iyi anlamak icin 7 soru soracagiz.',
    questions: [
      '',
      'Isletmenizin online gorunurlugu nasil?',
      'Sosyal medya hesaplariniz aktif mi?',
      'Musteri geri bildirimi topluyor musunuz?',
      'Musterilerinizi elde tutma oraniniz nasil?',
      'Calisanlarinizin motivasyonu nasil?',
      'Upsell / cross-sell yapiyor musunuz?',
      'Isletme analitigini takip ediyor musunuz?'
    ],
    answerPrompt: '1, 2 veya 3 ile cevaplayin:',
    veryGood: 'Cok iyi',
    average: 'Ortalama',
    low: 'Dusuk',
    helpText: '*GrowApp Komutlari:*\n\n\u{1F4CB} "gorev" \u2014 Gunun gorevlerini gor\n\u2753 "yardim" \u2014 Bu mesaj\n\u{1F4AC} Herhangi bir soru sor \u2014 AI danismandan cevap al\n\nHer sabah 09:00\'da otomatik gorev alirsiniz.',
    taskCommands: ['gorev', 'gorevler', 'tasks', 'task', 'g', 'menu'],
    helpCommands: ['yardim', 'help', 'h'],
    todaysTasks: '\u{1F4CB} *Bugunun Gorevleri:*\n\n',
    taskDetailPrompt: '\u{1F446} Detay icin numara girin (1, 2, 3):',
    enterNumber: '1, 2 veya 3 girin:',
    done: '\u2705 Yaptim',
    snooze: '\u23F0 Ertele',
    dismiss: '\u274C Istemiyorum',
    blacklist: '\u{1F6AB} Bir daha onerme',
    taskDone: (name) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" tamamlandi!`,
    taskSnoozed: (name) => `\u23F0 "${name}" ertelendi. Yarin tekrar onerilecek.`,
    taskBlacklisted: (name) => `\u{1F6AB} "${name}" bir daha onerilmeyecek.`,
    dismissReasonPrompt: '\u{1F4DD} Neden istemiyorsunuz? Kisa bir aciklama yazin:',
    taskDismissed: (name) => `\u{1F4DD} "${name}" reddedildi. Geri bildiriminiz kaydedildi.\n\n"gorev" yazarak diger gorevleri gorebilirsiniz.`,
    writeReasonPrompt: 'Lutfen bir neden yazin:',
    noTasks: 'Su an icin yeni gorev onerisi yok. Yarin tekrar kontrol edin! \u{1F4C5}',
    goodMorning: 'Gunaydin! Bugunun gorevleri:\n\n',
    impactHigh: 'Yuksek',
    impactMedium: 'Orta',
    impactLow: 'Dusuk',
    analysisComplete: '\u{1F389} Analiziniz tamamlandi!',
    aiAdvice: '\u{1F916} *AI Tavsiyesi:*',
    errorRetry: 'Bir hata olustu, tekrar deneyin.',
    actionPrompt: 'Secin:\n1. \u2705 Yaptim\n2. \u23F0 Ertele\n3. \u274C Istemiyorum\n4. \u{1F6AB} Bir daha onerme',
    verificationSubject: 'GrowApp - Dogrulama Kodu',
    verificationEmailText: 'E-posta dogrulama kodunuz:',
    verificationExpiry: 'Bu kod 10 dakika gecerlidir.',
    qLabels: { q1: 'Online gorunurluk', q2: 'Sosyal medya', q3: 'Musteri geri bildirimi', q4: 'Musteri tutma', q5: 'Calisan motivasyonu', q6: 'Upsell', q7: 'Analitik' },
    geminiSystemPrompt: 'Sen GrowApp isletme danismani botusun. Kafe ve restoran sahiplerine isletmelerini buyutmeleri icin tavsiyeler veriyorsun. Turkce, kisa, motive edici ve pratik cevaplar ver. Emoji kullan. 150 kelimeyi gecme.',
    geminiLang: 'Turkce',
    industryLabel: (ind) => ind === 'cafe' ? 'Kafe' : 'Restoran',
    whyLabel: 'Neden onemli',
    howLabel: 'Nasil yapilir',
    templateLabel: 'Sablon',
    timeLabel: 'Tahmini sure',
    pointsLabel: 'Puan',
    taskCompletePoints: (name, pts) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" tamamlandi! +${pts} puan kazandiniz!`
  },
  en: {
    welcome: 'Hello! Welcome to GrowApp! \u{1F680}\n\nWe will suggest personalized daily tasks to help grow your business.\n\nEnter your email address to get started:',
    invalidEmail: '\u274C Invalid email. Please enter a valid email:',
    emailReceived: '\u2705 Email received!\n\nNow set a password (at least 6 characters):',
    passwordTooShort: '\u274C Password must be at least 6 characters. Try again:',
    verificationSent: (email) => `\u{1F4E7} We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email (${email}).\n\nEnter the code:`,
    enterCode: 'Enter the 6-digit code:',
    wrongCode: '\u274C Wrong code! Try again:',
    codeExpired: '\u23F0 Code has expired. Type "renew" to request a new code:',
    emailVerified: '\u2705 Email verified!\n\nNow enter your business name:',
    businessNameTooShort: 'Business name must be at least 2 characters:',
    businessNameConfirm: (name) => `Great, "${name}"! \u{1F3EA}\n\nSelect your business type:`,
    cafe: '\u2615 Cafe',
    restaurant: '\u{1F37D}\uFE0F Restaurant',
    selectCafeOrRestaurant: 'Select "Cafe" or "Restaurant":',
    surveyIntro: '\u{1F4CA} Excellent! We will now ask 7 questions to better understand your business.',
    questions: [
      '',
      'How is your business\'s online visibility?',
      'Are your social media accounts active?',
      'Do you collect customer feedback?',
      'How is your customer retention rate?',
      'How is your employees\' motivation?',
      'Do you do upsell / cross-sell?',
      'Do you track business analytics?'
    ],
    answerPrompt: 'Answer with 1, 2, or 3:',
    veryGood: 'Very good',
    average: 'Average',
    low: 'Low',
    helpText: '*GrowApp Commands:*\n\n\u{1F4CB} "task" \u2014 See today\'s tasks\n\u2753 "help" \u2014 This message\n\u{1F4AC} Ask any question \u2014 Get an answer from AI advisor\n\nYou will receive automatic tasks at 09:00 every morning.',
    taskCommands: ['task', 'tasks', 'gorev', 'gorevler', 'g', 'menu'],
    helpCommands: ['help', 'yardim', 'h'],
    todaysTasks: '\u{1F4CB} *Today\'s Tasks:*\n\n',
    taskDetailPrompt: '\u{1F446} Enter a number for details (1, 2, 3):',
    enterNumber: 'Enter 1, 2, or 3:',
    done: '\u2705 Done',
    snooze: '\u23F0 Snooze',
    dismiss: '\u274C Don\'t want',
    blacklist: '\u{1F6AB} Never suggest again',
    taskDone: (name) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" completed!`,
    taskSnoozed: (name) => `\u23F0 "${name}" snoozed. Will be suggested again tomorrow.`,
    taskBlacklisted: (name) => `\u{1F6AB} "${name}" will never be suggested again.`,
    dismissReasonPrompt: '\u{1F4DD} Why don\'t you want this? Write a short explanation:',
    taskDismissed: (name) => `\u{1F4DD} "${name}" dismissed. Your feedback has been recorded.\n\nType "task" to see other tasks.`,
    writeReasonPrompt: 'Please write a reason:',
    noTasks: 'No new task suggestions at the moment. Check again tomorrow! \u{1F4C5}',
    goodMorning: 'Good morning! Today\'s tasks:\n\n',
    impactHigh: 'High',
    impactMedium: 'Medium',
    impactLow: 'Low',
    analysisComplete: '\u{1F389} Your analysis is complete!',
    aiAdvice: '\u{1F916} *AI Advice:*',
    errorRetry: 'An error occurred, please try again.',
    actionPrompt: 'Choose:\n1. \u2705 Done\n2. \u23F0 Snooze\n3. \u274C Don\'t want\n4. \u{1F6AB} Never suggest again',
    verificationSubject: 'GrowApp - Verification Code',
    verificationEmailText: 'Your email verification code:',
    verificationExpiry: 'This code is valid for 10 minutes.',
    qLabels: { q1: 'Online visibility', q2: 'Social media', q3: 'Customer feedback', q4: 'Customer retention', q5: 'Employee motivation', q6: 'Upsell', q7: 'Analytics' },
    geminiSystemPrompt: 'You are a GrowApp business advisor bot. You advise cafe and restaurant owners on growing their businesses. Give short, motivating and practical answers in English. Use emojis. Do not exceed 150 words.',
    geminiLang: 'English',
    industryLabel: (ind) => ind === 'cafe' ? 'Cafe' : 'Restaurant',
    whyLabel: 'Why it matters',
    howLabel: 'How to do it',
    templateLabel: 'Template',
    timeLabel: 'Estimated time',
    pointsLabel: 'Points',
    taskCompletePoints: (name, pts) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" completed! +${pts} points earned!`
  },
  de: {
    welcome: 'Hallo! Willkommen bei GrowApp! \u{1F680}\n\nWir werden Ihnen taeglich personalisierte Aufgaben vorschlagen, um Ihr Geschaeft zu vergroessern.\n\nGeben Sie Ihre E-Mail-Adresse ein, um zu beginnen:',
    invalidEmail: '\u274C Ungueltige E-Mail. Bitte geben Sie eine gueltige E-Mail ein:',
    emailReceived: '\u2705 E-Mail erhalten!\n\nLegen Sie jetzt ein Passwort fest (mindestens 6 Zeichen):',
    passwordTooShort: '\u274C Das Passwort muss mindestens 6 Zeichen lang sein. Versuchen Sie es erneut:',
    verificationSent: (email) => `\u{1F4E7} Wir haben einen 6-stelligen Bestaetigungscode an Ihre E-Mail gesendet (${email}).\n\nGeben Sie den Code ein:`,
    enterCode: 'Geben Sie den 6-stelligen Code ein:',
    wrongCode: '\u274C Falscher Code! Versuchen Sie es erneut:',
    codeExpired: '\u23F0 Der Code ist abgelaufen. Schreiben Sie "erneuern", um einen neuen Code anzufordern:',
    emailVerified: '\u2705 E-Mail bestaetigt!\n\nGeben Sie jetzt den Namen Ihres Unternehmens ein:',
    businessNameTooShort: 'Der Unternehmensname muss mindestens 2 Zeichen lang sein:',
    businessNameConfirm: (name) => `Grossartig, "${name}"! \u{1F3EA}\n\nWaehlen Sie Ihren Unternehmenstyp:`,
    cafe: '\u2615 Cafe',
    restaurant: '\u{1F37D}\uFE0F Restaurant',
    selectCafeOrRestaurant: 'Waehlen Sie "Cafe" oder "Restaurant":',
    surveyIntro: '\u{1F4CA} Ausgezeichnet! Wir stellen Ihnen jetzt 7 Fragen, um Ihr Unternehmen besser zu verstehen.',
    questions: [
      '',
      'Wie ist die Online-Sichtbarkeit Ihres Unternehmens?',
      'Sind Ihre Social-Media-Konten aktiv?',
      'Sammeln Sie Kundenfeedback?',
      'Wie ist Ihre Kundenbindungsrate?',
      'Wie ist die Motivation Ihrer Mitarbeiter?',
      'Betreiben Sie Upselling / Cross-Selling?',
      'Verfolgen Sie Geschaeftsanalysen?'

    answerPrompt: 'Antworten Sie mit 1, 2 oder 3:',
    veryGood: 'Sehr gut',
    average: 'Durchschnittlich',
    low: 'Niedrig',
    helpText: '*GrowApp Befehle:*\n\n\u{1F4CB} "aufgabe" \u2014 Heutige Aufgaben anzeigen\n\u2753 "hilfe" \u2014 Diese Nachricht\n\u{1F4AC} Stellen Sie eine Frage \u2014 Erhalten Sie eine Antwort vom AI-Berater\n\nSie erhalten jeden Morgen um 09:00 Uhr automatische Aufgaben.',
    taskCommands: ['aufgabe', 'aufgaben', 'tasks', 'task', 'gorev', 'g', 'menu'],

    todaysTasks: '\u{1F4CB} *Heutige Aufgaben:*\n\n',
    taskDetailPrompt: '\u{1F446} Geben Sie eine Nummer fuer Details ein (1, 2, 3):',

    done: '\u2705 Erledigt',
    snooze: '\u23F0 Verschieben',
    dismiss: '\u274C Nicht gewuenscht',
    blacklist: '\u{1F6AB} Nie wieder vorschlagen',
    taskDone: (name) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" abgeschlossen!`,
    taskSnoozed: (name) => `\u23F0 "${name}" verschoben. Wird morgen erneut vorgeschlagen.`,
    taskBlacklisted: (name) => `\u{1F6AB} "${name}" wird nie wieder vorgeschlagen.`,
    dismissReasonPrompt: '\u{1F4DD} Warum moechten Sie das nicht? Schreiben Sie eine kurze Erklaerung:',
    taskDismissed: (name) => `\u{1F4DD} "${name}" abgelehnt. Ihr Feedback wurde gespeichert.\n\nSchreiben Sie "aufgabe", um andere Aufgaben zu sehen.`,
    writeReasonPrompt: 'Bitte schreiben Sie einen Grund:',
    noTasks: 'Derzeit keine neuen Aufgabenvorschlaege. Schauen Sie morgen wieder vorbei! \u{1F4C5}',
    goodMorning: 'Guten Morgen! Heutige Aufgaben:\n\n',
    impactHigh: 'Hoch',
    impactMedium: 'Mittel',
    impactLow: 'Niedrig',
    analysisComplete: '\u{1F389} Ihre Analyse ist abgeschlossen!',
    aiAdvice: '\u{1F916} *AI-Beratung:*',
    errorRetry: 'Ein Fehler ist aufgetreten, bitte versuchen Sie es erneut.',
    actionPrompt: 'Waehlen Sie:\n1. \u2705 Erledigt\n2. \u23F0 Verschieben\n3. \u274C Nicht gewuenscht\n4. \u{1F6AB} Nie wieder vorschlagen',
    verificationSubject: 'GrowApp - Bestaetigungscode',
    verificationEmailText: 'Ihr E-Mail-Bestaetigungscode:',
    verificationExpiry: 'Dieser Code ist 10 Minuten gueltig.',
    qLabels: { q1: 'Online-Sichtbarkeit', q2: 'Soziale Medien', q3: 'Kundenfeedback', q4: 'Kundenbindung', q5: 'Mitarbeitermotivation', q6: 'Upselling', q7: 'Analytik' },
    geminiSystemPrompt: 'Du bist ein GrowApp-Geschaeftsberater-Bot. Du beraetst Cafe- und Restaurantbesitzer beim Wachstum ihrer Unternehmen. Gib kurze, motivierende und praktische Antworten auf Deutsch. Verwende Emojis. Ueberschreite nicht 150 Woerter.',
    geminiLang: 'Deutsch',
    industryLabel: (ind) => ind === 'cafe' ? 'Cafe' : 'Restaurant',
    whyLabel: 'Warum es wichtig ist',
    howLabel: 'Wie es geht',
    templateLabel: 'Vorlage',
    timeLabel: 'Geschaetzte Zeit',
    pointsLabel: 'Punkte',
    taskCompletePoints: (name, pts) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" abgeschlossen! +${pts} Punkte verdient!`
  },
  es: {
    welcome: 'Hola! Bienvenido a GrowApp! \u{1F680}\n\nTe sugeriremos tareas personalizadas diarias para hacer crecer tu negocio.\n\nIngresa tu correo electronico para comenzar:',
    invalidEmail: '\u274C Correo invalido. Por favor ingresa un correo valido:',
    emailReceived: '\u2705 Correo recibido!\n\nAhora establece una contrasena (minimo 6 caracteres):',
    passwordTooShort: '\u274C La contrasena debe tener al menos 6 caracteres. Intentalo de nuevo:',
    verificationSent: (email) => `\u{1F4E7} Enviamos un codigo de verificacion de 6 digitos a tu correo (${email}).\n\nIngresa el codigo:`,
    enterCode: 'Ingresa el codigo de 6 digitos:',
    wrongCode: '\u274C Codigo incorrecto! Intentalo de nuevo:',

    emailVerified: '\u2705 Correo verificado!\n\nAhora ingresa el nombre de tu negocio:',
    businessNameTooShort: 'El nombre del negocio debe tener al menos 2 caracteres:',
    businessNameConfirm: (name) => `Genial, "${name}"! \u{1F3EA}\n\nSelecciona el tipo de tu negocio:`,
    cafe: '\u2615 Cafe',
    restaurant: '\u{1F37D}\uFE0F Restaurante',
    selectCafeOrRestaurant: 'Selecciona "Cafe" o "Restaurante":',

    answerPrompt: 'Responde con 1, 2 o 3:',
    veryGood: 'Muy bueno',
    average: 'Promedio',
    low: 'Bajo',
    helpText: '*Comandos GrowApp:*\n\n\u{1F4CB} "tarea" \u2014 Ver las tareas de hoy\n\u2753 "ayuda" \u2014 Este mensaje\n\u{1F4AC} Haz cualquier pregunta \u2014 Obtén respuesta del asesor AI\n\nRecibiras tareas automaticas a las 09:00 cada manana.',
    taskCommands: ['tarea', 'tareas', 'tasks', 'task', 'gorev', 'g', 'menu'],
    helpCommands: ['ayuda', 'help', 'yardim', 'h'],
    todaysTasks: '\u{1F4CB} *Tareas de Hoy:*\n\n',
    taskDetailPrompt: '\u{1F446} Ingresa un numero para detalles (1, 2, 3):',

    dismiss: '\u274C No quiero',
    blacklist: '\u{1F6AB} No sugerir mas',
    taskDone: (name) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" completada!`,
    taskSnoozed: (name) => `\u23F0 "${name}" pospuesta. Se sugerira de nuevo manana.`,
    taskBlacklisted: (name) => `\u{1F6AB} "${name}" no se sugerira mas.`,
    dismissReasonPrompt: '\u{1F4DD} Por que no la quieres? Escribe una breve explicacion:',
    taskDismissed: (name) => `\u{1F4DD} "${name}" rechazada. Tu comentario ha sido registrado.\n\nEscribe "tarea" para ver otras tareas.`,
    writeReasonPrompt: 'Por favor escribe una razon:',
    noTasks: 'No hay nuevas sugerencias de tareas por el momento. Revisa manana! \u{1F4C5}',
    goodMorning: 'Buenos dias! Tareas de hoy:\n\n',

    aiAdvice: '\u{1F916} *Consejo AI:*',
    errorRetry: 'Ocurrio un error, por favor intenta de nuevo.',
    actionPrompt: 'Elige:\n1. \u2705 Hecho\n2. \u23F0 Posponer\n3. \u274C No quiero\n4. \u{1F6AB} No sugerir mas',
    verificationSubject: 'GrowApp - Codigo de Verificacion',

    qLabels: { q1: 'Visibilidad en linea', q2: 'Redes sociales', q3: 'Comentarios de clientes', q4: 'Retencion de clientes', q5: 'Motivacion de empleados', q6: 'Upselling', q7: 'Analiticas' },
    geminiSystemPrompt: 'Eres un bot asesor de negocios GrowApp. Asesoras a duenos de cafes y restaurantes para hacer crecer sus negocios. Da respuestas cortas, motivadoras y practicas en espanol. Usa emojis. No excedas 150 palabras.',
    geminiLang: 'Espanol',

  },
  cs: {
    welcome: 'Ahoj! Vitejte v GrowApp! \u{1F680}\n\nKazdy den vam navrhneme personalizovane ukoly pro rust vaseho podnikani.\n\nZadejte svou e-mailovou adresu pro zahajeni:',
    invalidEmail: '\u274C Neplatny e-mail. Zadejte prosim platny e-mail:',
    emailReceived: '\u2705 E-mail prijat!\n\nNyni nastavte heslo (alespon 6 znaku):',
    passwordTooShort: '\u274C Heslo musi mit alespon 6 znaku. Zkuste to znovu:',

    businessNameTooShort: 'Nazev podniku musi mit alespon 2 znaky:',
    businessNameConfirm: (name) => `Skvele, "${name}"! \u{1F3EA}\n\nVyberte typ vaseho podniku:`,

    restaurant: '\u{1F37D}\uFE0F Restaurace',
    selectCafeOrRestaurant: 'Vyberte "Kavarna" nebo "Restaurace":',
    surveyIntro: '\u{1F4CA} Vyborne! Nyni vam polozime 7 otazek, abychom lepe porozumeli vasemu podnikani.',

    blacklist: '\u{1F6AB} Uz nenavrhovat',
    taskDone: (name) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" dokonceno!`,
    taskSnoozed: (name) => `\u23F0 "${name}" odlozeno. Bude navrzeno znovu zitra.`,
    taskBlacklisted: (name) => `\u{1F6AB} "${name}" uz nebude nikdy navrzeno.`,
    dismissReasonPrompt: '\u{1F4DD} Proc to nechcete? Napiste kratke vysvetleni:',
    taskDismissed: (name) => `\u{1F4DD} "${name}" odmitnuto. Vase zpetna vazba byla zaznamenana.\n\nNapiste "ukol" pro zobrazeni dalsich ukolu.`,
    writeReasonPrompt: 'Prosim napiste duvod:',
    noTasks: 'Momentalne zadne nove navrhy ukolu. Zkontrolujte to zitra! \u{1F4C5}',
    goodMorning: 'Dobre rano! Dnesni ukoly:\n\n',
    impactHigh: 'Vysoky',
    impactMedium: 'Stredni',
    impactLow: 'Nizky',
    analysisComplete: '\u{1F389} Vase analyza je dokoncena!',
    aiAdvice: '\u{1F916} *AI Rada:*',
    errorRetry: 'Doslo k chybe, zkuste to prosim znovu.',
    actionPrompt: 'Vyberte:\n1. \u2705 Hotovo\n2. \u23F0 Odlozit\n3. \u274C Nechci\n4. \u{1F6AB} Uz nenavrhovat',
    verificationSubject: 'GrowApp - Overovaci Kod',
    verificationEmailText: 'Vas overovaci kod e-mailu:',
    verificationExpiry: 'Tento kod je platny 10 minut.',
    qLabels: { q1: 'Online viditelnost', q2: 'Socialni site', q3: 'Zpetna vazba zakazniku', q4: 'Udrzeni zakazniku', q5: 'Motivace zamestnancu', q6: 'Upselling', q7: 'Analytika' },
    geminiSystemPrompt: 'Jsi GrowApp bot obchodni poradce. Radis majitelum kavaren a restauraci, jak rust jejich podnikani. Davej kratke, motivujici a prakticke odpovedi v cestine. Pouzivej emotikony. Nepresahuj 150 slov.',
    geminiLang: 'Cesky',
    industryLabel: (ind) => ind === 'cafe' ? 'Kavarna' : 'Restaurace',
    whyLabel: 'Proc je to dulezite',
    howLabel: 'Jak na to',
    templateLabel: 'Sablona',
    timeLabel: 'Odhadovany cas',
    pointsLabel: 'Body',
    taskCompletePoints: (name, pts) => `\u{1F389} "${name}" dokonceno! +${pts} bodu ziskano!`
  }
};

const t = translations[lang] || translations.tr;

return [{ json: { ...data, lang, t } }];
